items.title: Navigation and onboarding step labels
items.scope: frontend — centralize option-set labels for onboarding_step_os, path_page_tab_os, and settings_tab_os as typed constants and i18n-ready maps in frontend
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: onboarding_step_os (13 values) exported from frontend/src/domain/enums/onboardingSteps.ts matching ir/inventory.json display strings
AC-2: path_page_tab_os and settings_tab_os labels available for router/tab components with stable slug keys
AC-3: Enum maps include bubble option-set ids as comments for traceability to IR

items.title: Onboarding question and answer enums
items.scope: frontend — migrate customer pillar, role, state, alignment, performance, stability, and load-signal option sets used during onboarding questionnaires
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: customer_pillar_os, customer_role_os, customer_state_os value/label pairs match IR option_set.value entries
AC-2: Question/answer pairs for customer_alignment_*, customer_performance_*, customer_stability_*, customers_load_signal_* exported for onboarding step components
AC-3: No hardcoded onboarding labels in Vue SFCs — components import from domain/enums/onboardingQuestions.ts

items.title: Path, coaching, and wellness state enums
items.scope: frontend — migrate path_enrollment_status, ai_coaching_mode_os, ai_confidence_level_os, state_energy_level_os, and state_nervous_system_os for paths and dashboard features
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: path_enrollment_status (4 values) drives path enrollment badges with IR-accurate labels
AC-2: ai_coaching_mode_os and ai_confidence_level_os exported for chat/paths UI selectors
AC-3: state_energy_level_os and state_nervous_system_os available for journal/check-in components

items.title: Tier and subscription labels
items.scope: frontend — migrate tier_os labels for settings/subscription surfaces and any paywall gating copy tied to option sets
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: tier_os (3 values) exported with display strings from IR for subscription UI
AC-2: Settings subscription tab can render tier names without reading Bubble option sets at runtime
AC-3: Enum module documents mapping from tier_os ids to future Supabase subscription_plan rows (read-only reference)
